org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializerBuilder

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.serializer
Serialization/Deserialization package for converting Object to (and from) binary data.

  • Uses of GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializerBuilder in org.springframework.data.redis.serializer

    GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer.builder()
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Factory method returning a Builder used to construct and configure a GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer.

    Configure Jackson2ObjectReader.
